ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the survey */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., household chaos, behavioral studies) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the survey */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., Draft, Active, Completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the survey */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the survey was updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the survey */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Detailed documentation about the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Actual text of the question */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of field for the question (e.g., radio, text box) */,
  "field_label" TEXT /* Label for the field */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the survey */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Whether the question is mandatory */,
  "options" TEXT /* Possible options for multiple-choice questions */,
  "help_text" TEXT /* Additional help text or instructions for the question */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the question */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the question was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was provided */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Actual response value (e.g., TRUE, FALSE) */,
  "is_complete" INTEGER /* Whether the response is complete */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the response (e.g., web, email, paper) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the response */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who submitted the response */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the response was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the participant is taking */,
  "invitation_date" TEXT /* Date the participant was invited */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., Invited, Started, Completed) */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Whether the participant is anonymous */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity date (e.g., last response submitted) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who invited the participant */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the participant was invited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (encrypted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being distributed */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date the survey is to be distributed */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date reminders are to be sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., Pending, Sent, Completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the schedule */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the schedule was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the schedule was updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_schedules_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being summarized */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being summarized */,
  "response_count" INTEGER /* Number of responses for the question */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average time taken to respond to the question */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate for the question */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the summary was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the summary was updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_summary_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_summary_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)
